arabic_text:
نفس = نف + س
نفث = نف + ث
نفح = نف + ح
نفخ = نف + خ
english_text:
To Breadth (blow normally)
To blow very lightly
Breeze
To blow forcefully
alt_text: Four stacked white cards showing Arabic root-letter derivations: each card displays an Arabic verb (نفس / نفث / نفح / نفخ) decomposed as 'نف +' a final letter, with an English gloss — 'To Breadth (blow normally)', 'To blow very lightly', 'Breeze', 'To blow forcefully'.
notes: Pedagogical Arabic morphology — how single-letter changes in the final radical shift the semantic intensity of the same root nf-.
